special_mechanics.name: Energy System
special_mechanics.description: Player has a numeral energy indicator that gradually depletes when taking damage from enemy bullets or touching enemies. Player can continue at the beginning of current section as long as energy remains. When all energy is lost, player restarts at beginning of stage with full energy.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player starts with standard laser rifle and can upgrade to Flash Buster (three-direction medium-range bullets) or Megasmasher (wider v-shaped laser beams). Can further upgrade to Mega Buster combining both effects. Barrier Shield available for protection (32 shots).

special_mechanics.name: Special Transmission Shells
special_mechanics.description: Activated by pressing both fire buttons simultaneously. Available shells include Mega Missile, Flash Bomb, and Crush Ball. Each costs 4 energy points to use.

special_mechanics.name: Power Generators
special_mechanics.description: Destroying power generators in each stage increases maximum energy capacity and opens path to final section of stage.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Only qualitative gameplay mechanics documented. No quantitative physics parameters available in sources. This is primarily a side-scrolling action-shooter with emphasis on energy management and strategic positioning rather than precise movement mechanics. No jump physics, gravity values, or velocity data present in documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Section Z (NES, Famicom Disk System)
